title: daemon/store.rs: invite-code check is DEFERRED, not EXCLUSIVE
description:
daemon/src/store.rs use_space_invite_code: transaction opened with self.pool.begin() defaults to DEFERRED isolation in SQLite WAL mode. Two concurrent requests can both read the invite row (seeing uses_remaining > 0) before either transaction commits its decrement, allowing the invite to be used more times than its limit.

Root cause: SQLite WAL allows concurrent readers even inside a DEFERRED transaction; a write lock is not acquired until the first write statement.

Fix: replace pool.begin() with a raw BEGIN EXCLUSIVE or BEGIN IMMEDIATE so the write lock is acquired at transaction start, serializing all invite redemptions.
